name: Tapu Sena Ki Outstation Trip
desc: Tapu Sena visit Popatlal and helps cheer up his mood. Later, Tapu informs Jethalal that he is going outstation on a trip with all of his friends.

name: Sapna Ki Love Story
desc: A man named Swapnil loves Sapna, and Pyaarelal brings him to his Shagun ceremony and helps them get together with each other. Later, Pyaarelal decides to change his name back to Popatlal.

name: Yellow Shagun Ceremony
desc: Pyaarelal calls and invites Bagha, Nattu kaka and Bawri for his Shagun ceremony with Sapna. Later, everyone welcomes Sapna and her family to Gokuldham society.

name: Kalpana Ka Final Decision
desc: Kalpana and her family find out the truth about Pyaarelal's name and Kalpana decides to break up with him. Later, Jethalal and Taarak give good news to Pyaarelal. What is it?

name: Pyaarelal Ke Khushi Ka Din
desc: Gokuldham society members prepare for Pyaarelal and Kalpana's Shagun ceremony. Later, Kalpana comes with her family to Pyaarelal's house.

name: Pyaarelal Ka Shagun
desc: Pyaarelal tells his dream to everyone. Kalpana's father fixes a meeting with Pyaarelal to give him Shagun, and Sapna's family also decides to come with Shagun to Pyaarelal's house.

name: Yellow Or Blue?
desc: Kalpana gets a tatto for Pyaarelal. Pyaarelal goes to Sapna while he is on a date with Kalpana. Police find Pyaarelal's behaviour suspicious and keep an eye on him.

name: 6 Baje Wali Samasya
desc: Kalpana and Sapna are head over heels in love with Pyaarelal. Pyaarelal is worried because he fixes a date with Kalpana and Sapna at the same time and same place. What will happen now?

name: Bohot Sara Khaana
desc: Pyaarelal goes out with Sapna to get to know her better but soon leaves to meet Kalpana. Will Pyaarelal be able to choose one girl between Kalpana and Sapna?

name: Pyaarelal Ke Bahane
desc: Pyaarelal tells Sapna he has to leave to attend to a work emergency but instead goes to meet Kalpana. Will Sapna find out about this?

name: Pyaarelal Under Pressure
desc: Pyaarelal decides to meet Sapna and Kalpana once again. Later, Sapna's family treats Pyaarelal like their son-in-law which makes the situation even more difficult for him.

name: Tapu Sena Ka Idea
desc: Champaklal asks Pyaarelal to refuse to marry either Sapna or Kalpana. Later, Pyaarelal tells Tapu Sena about his problem. Will Tapu Sena find a solution to his problem?

name: Pyaarelal's Dilemma
desc: Pyaarelal gets into trouble when he says yes to both Kalpana and Sapna for marriage. How will he get out of this problem?

name: Hum Dono Ki Haan Hai
desc: Pyaarelal and Kalpana talk in private. Later, Sapna and Kalpana both agree to marry Pyaarelal. What will happen now?

name: Sapna Ya Kalpana?
desc: Pyaarelal and Sapna talk it out in person and seem to like each other. However, Pyaarelal is concerned about meeting Kalpana first before giving his decision. Who will he pick?

name: Sapna Ka Jawab
desc: Sapna's father asks questions to Pyaarelal. Sapna and Pyaarelal talk in private to get to know each other better. Will Sapna say yes to Pyaarelal?

name: Ek Ghante Ki Meeting
desc: Everyone gets ready to meet Sapna and Kalpana. Pyaarelal gets happy when he meets Sapna. Will this meeting change Pyaarelal's life?

name: Do Do Rishte
desc: Taarak convinces his boss to give him leave from the office for half a day. Pyaarelal asks Anjali about Sapna. Later, Pyaarelal sets up a meeting with two different girls for marriage on the same day. What will happen now?

name: Rishta Aa Gaya
desc: Pyaarelal starts doubting his decision to change the name but Anjali informs him about a proposal that came for him. Later, Pyaarelal asks Taarak to take an off from the office and be with him, but his boss is in a bad mood. What will Taarak do now?

name: Pyaarelal Ka Purse
desc: A girl compliments Pyaarelal for his name and will marry someone with the same name. Pyaarelal's editor is upset with him because he changed his name. Later, Pyaarelal gets into confusion with the police because of his name.

name: Alvida Popatlal
desc: Tapu Sena decides to give a gift to Popatlal. Popatlal's relative's ghost is angry because she doesn't want him to change his name. What will he do now?

name: Unlucky Name
desc: Jethalal suggests a few names from the letter P for Popatlal. Later, Popatlal finally finds the perfect name for himself but Iyer says it's not the right name for him. What will happen now?

name: Choose One Name
desc: Everyone from Gokuldham society votes for names that would suit Popatlal the most. Whose name will Popatlal choose?

name: Name Voting
desc: Everyone arrives at Popatlal's name ceremony party except Jethalal and Champaklal. Later, Popatlal gives a speech to everyone.

name: P Se Naam
desc: Everyone tries to find a new name for Popatlal. Later, Popatlal invites everyone to his party to celebrate his name-keeping ceremony.

name: Beheno Ka Decision
desc: Bagha makes chits to solve Popatlal's problem. Popatlal decides to let Mahila Mandal make the final decision about his name. Will Mahila Mandal solve Popatlal's problem?

name: Kuch Pao Aur Kuch Kho
desc: Popatlal says he needs some time to think about changing his name. Bhide gets worried when Viku Kaka sees Sonu's hand and says she will get married to someone who lives nearby. Later, Popatlal goes to Jethalal and asks for his advice.

name: Matchmaker Vinu Kaka
desc: Popatlal finds out about Vinu Kaka and feels positive about his marriage. Later, Popatlal meets Vinu Kaka and asks him about his marriage. Will Popatlal get any good news?

name: Popatlal Is Hurt
desc: Popatlal gets angry when Jethalal says girls refuse to get married to him. Later, someone plays the violin in the Gokuldham society, and everybody dances. Who is this talented person?

name: Hasi Khushi Se Raho
desc: Madhavi gets extremely upset because she thinks Bhide doesn't like her food. Later, Gokuldham men meet at Abdul's soda shop, and Taarak's deep words impress everyone.

name: Popatlal Ki Shaadi Ki Charcha
desc: Anjali and Taarak talk about Popatlal's marriage. Later, the kids tell Champaklal about their new game.

name: Bhide Ki Asli Baat
desc: Champaklal decides to give everyone a dinner treat. Jethalal is curious about what Bhide wanted to tell him and asks for Taarak's help. Will Bhide tell Jethalal the truth?

name: Bhide Ko Laga Jhatka
desc: Tapu gives a surprise to everyone and a return gift to Champaklal. Later, everyone asks Bhide what he wanted to talk to Jethalal about.

name: Problem Kya Hai?
desc: Everyone tries to find out what happened between Bhide and Jethalal. Later, Everyone gathers in Jethalal's house and waits for Bhide to come. What will Bhide do now?

name: Bhide Ki Sharamnak News
desc: Bhide tells Madhavi about Tapu and Sonu, but she doesn't believe him. Bhide calls Jethalal and says he has a piece of very shocking news for him. How will Jethalal react to Bhide's news?

name: Tapu Ka Proposal
desc: Bhide gets scared when he finds out his friend's daughter ran away with someone. Later, Bhide sees Tapu planning a surprise for Sonu and proposing to her. How will Bhide react now?

name: Jasoos Bhide
desc: Bhide follows Tapu and Sonu and spies on them. What will he find after following them?

name: Bhide Gets Protective
desc: Bhide scolds Tapu for calling Sonu inappropriately. Later, Bhide reads Tapu's messages on Sonu's phone and gets furious.

name: Surprise Gift
desc: Champaklal decides to give a surprise gift to Tapu. Later, Bhide stops Tapu Sena from playing cricket at night. What will Tapu Sena do now?

name: Babita Ke Car Ka Sapna Hua Poora
desc: Babita thanks everyone for making her dream come true. Jethalal asks Taarak to write a letter to Rustom. Later, Gada Electronic employees get sad when they don't get a commission from Jethalal.

name: Chamatkari Baba
desc: Nattu Kaka and Bagha tell everyone that whoever took out the ink from the coupon has asked them not to reveal his identity. Who is this mystery man?

name: Jethalal's Letter
desc: The entire Gokuldham society cheers for Jethalal. Rustom asks Babita to send the car to his showroom for registration. Babita reads the letter Jethalal had written to her. What will be Babita's reaction?

name: Car Ka Golmol
desc: Babita asks Jethalal to call Ramsung company and ask about the car. Jethalal tries to tell the truth to Babita in front of everyone when Bagha along with Rustom arrives in Gokuldham society. Will Babita finally learn the truth?

name: Iyer Ke Liye Surprise
desc: Taarak asks Jethalal to tell Iyer the entire truth. Everyone is eagerly waiting for Babita's car, and Tapu Sena prepares to surprise Iyer.

name: Jethalal Ka Khat
desc: Jethalal asks Goli to give his letter to Babita. Babita loses the letter and calls Jethalal to ask about the letter. Will Jethalal tell her the truth?

name: Dukh Dayak Samachar
desc: Taarak acts irritable and asks Jethalal to talk to Babita. Babita asks Tapu to get a cake for Jethalal. Later, Jethalal writes a letter to Babita. What will happen next?

name: Jethalal Is Restless
desc: Jethalal is not able to sleep because he is tense and decides to run away from home. Will he run away from the situation or face the situation and own his mistake?

name: Taarak And Jethalal Are Stressed
desc: Taarak gets upset when Anjali asks him to welcome Babita's new car with everyone. Popatlal calls Jethalal to Abdul's soda shop, but Jethalal avoids his call.

name: Babita Ki Narazgi
desc: Jethalal and Taarak arrive at Babita's house to tell her the truth about the car coupon. How will Babita react when she finds out what happened?

name: Sachai Ki Raah
desc: Taarak prepares Jethalal to tell the truth to Babita and Champaklal. Later, Babita along with Tapu Sena plans to surprise Iyer with the new car.

name: Car Coupon Ka Sach
desc: Jethalal decides to tell the truth to Rustom about the car coupon. How will Rustom react to the truth?

name: Taarak Ka Tedha Idea
desc: Rustom makes it clear to Jethalal that if he doesn't receive the car coupon before 6 pm, he won't give the car to Babita. Taarak has an idea that he believes could help Jethalal with his problem, but his boss won't let him out of his sight. How will Taarak help Jethalal now?

name: Sihayi Hatane Ka Idea
desc: Bagha asks Dolly from Ramsung about Babita's car colour. Bagha suggests they should make a duplicate car coupon. Later, Taarak gives an idea to Jethalal on how to get the ink off the car coupon. Will this idea work?

name: Babita Ka License
desc: Bagha uses Bawri's idea to prevent Rustom and Babita from learning the truth. Mahila Mandal is very excited because Babita is getting a car. How will everyone react when they get to know about Jethalal's lies?

name: Car Coupon
desc: Rustom from Ramsung congratulates Jethalal and gives him a certificate of appreciation. Jethalal tells Rustom he doesn't have the car coupon. How will Rustom react?

name: Is The Coupon At Risk?
desc: Jethalal is ecstatic to inform Babita about her being able to receive the car on her preferred day. Later, Jethalal calls Taarak in agony, asking for help on a situation with the coupon. What is it regarding?

name: Taarak Warns Jethalal
desc: Taarak warns Jethalal, asking him to be careful with the coupons because of his streak of bad luck when it comes to handling others' responsibilities. Meanwhile, Babita registers for driving lessons and Jethalal tries to speed up the process of Babita receiving the car earlier than customary.

name: Coupon Kahan Gaya?
desc: Babita gets a nightmare and calls Jethalal in the middle of the night to make sure that the coupon is safe with Jethalal. The following morning, Jethalal leaves for his shop with Babita, Bhide and Popatlal coupons.

name: Khushi Bhet
desc: Jethalal, Bagha and Nattu Kaka recount the events that transpired during the lucky draw viewing at the clubhouse, for Champaklal. Later, an excited Babita decides to attend driving lessons.

name: Popatlal Wins The Honeymoon Coupon
desc: All the society members gear up for the announcement of the last two coupon prizes. With Popatlal having won the honeymoon coupon, who will win the car?

name: Lucky Draw Ka Din
desc: All the society members gather together in the clubhouse for the lucky draw's announcement hoping to win a car under the Ramsang company's scheme. Who will win the car?

name: Kaash Mujhe Car Mil Jae
desc: Bhide interrupts Tapu Sena's enthusiasm for creating a ruckus in the compound. Later, the society members pray to their respective gods, asking god to make them win the car.

name: Fantasies About Winning The Lucky Draw
desc: Jethalal is happy about the day that it has gone well. The society members decide to sit together at the clubhouse to watch the results of the lucky draw. They fantasize about what they'd do if they won the car.

name: Chalu Panday Arrives At Gada Electronics
desc: Inspector Panday arrives at Jethalal's shop to shop under the scheme followed by Babita. All the society members make their purchases under the scheme and return to the society.

name: The Society Members Reach The Shop
desc: Sunita reaches Jethalal's shop to make a purchase. While Jethalal and his team continue attending to various customers, the society members, except Babita, arrive at the shop. Will Babita reach in time?

name: The Day Of The Scheme
desc: The society members assemble before setting out to make purchases under the scheme at Gada Electronics. Meanwhile, Jethalal's shop is packed with customers. Will the society members reach on time before the coupons run out?

name: Sale At Gada Electronics
desc: Jethalal gets anxious when he sees there are no customers at Gada electronics. Bagha gets caps for the employees of Gada electronics. Will people turn up at Gada Electronics?

name: Jethalal Gets Concerned
desc: All the society members are impressed with the promotional video made by Tapu Sena, for the scheme offered by Gada Electronics. Jethalal shares his worries with Taarak about the probability of things not running smoothly. What will happen?

name: Tapu Sena Ka Marketing Plan
desc: Bagha and Nattu Kaka ask Bawri to hide before Jethalal reaches the store. Tapu Sena presents their marketing plan for the scheme before Jethalal. Later, a crowd assembles outside Jethalal's shop but doesn't enter the premises. What is the matter?

name: Scheme Ke Liye Excitement
desc: The society members are excited and looking forward to making purchases under the scheme offered by Gada Electronics. Bagha and Natu Kaka have made all the necessary preparations for the big day of the sale. How will Jethalal react?

name: Popatlal Calls Out On The Scheme
desc: Popatlal calls out schemes such as the one announced by Jethalal, to be fraudulent. All the society members look forward to making purchases to increase their probability of benefiting from the scheme.

name: Gada Electronics Ki Scheme
desc: Jethalal is excited about the new scheme that Gada Electronics has been selected for and wishes to see Babita benefit from it. Tapu is keen on marketing this scheme in the best possible way. Later, Jethalal tells the society members about the scheme at Gada Electronics.

name: Nayi Scheme
desc: Rustom from Ramsang company decides to put Gada Electronics on the blacklist for Jethalal's unprofessional behaviour. Jethalal sees Rustom running from Gada Electronics and assumes he is a thief. What will happen now?

name: Rickshaw Kahan Hain?
desc: Jethalal and Babita cannot find an auto that is ready to take them to their destination. He then faces a group of angry auto drivers. Will Jethalal reach his shop in time with the important meeting inching closer?

name: Tapu Sena Ki Safalta
desc: Popatlal confronts Asit Kumarr Modi about not finding a suitable bride for him. Meanwhile, everyone enjoys the rhymes and mobile games created by Tapu Sena.

name: Manoranjan Ka Khazana
desc: Gokuldham residents praise Tapu Sena for their innovative ideas and hard work. Later, Gokuldham residents celebrate Gudi Padwa together.

name: Suspense Khatam Hua
desc: The secret investor turns out to be none other than Asit Kumarr Modi, who helped Tapu Sena put their entire project together. Only one question remains now, what is this secret project that the kids have been working so hard for?

name: Program Ka Chief Guest
desc: Gokuldham residents arrive at the clubhouse for the special program. All of them are curious about the secret chief guest for their program. Who could it be?

name: Bhide Hai Pareshan
desc: Bhide is worried and wants to find out what is Tapu Sena going to do at 8:30 pm and comes up with an idea. Will he be able to find out about their plan?

name: Tapu Sena Ka Nimantran
desc: Everyone is wondering what could be Tapu Sena's secret project. Meanwhile, Tapu Sena invites all the residents of Gokuldham to the clubhouse, where they will present their idea.

name: Baccho Ka Secret Project
desc: Jethalal and the others ask for Bapuji's help to find out what Tapu Sena is up to. Meanwhile, the kids decide to present their secret project in front of everyone the next day.

name: Tapu Sena's New Mission
desc: Taarak talks to the kids about their career goals. Tapu promises that all of them will come up with a plan to make their families proud.

name: Baccho Ka Bhavishya
desc: All the parents are worried that the kids are not focused on their life goals. Tapu comes up with an idea which will alleviate their tension and also ensure that the fun in their life never ends.

name: Aage Ki Soch
desc: Babita and Iyer come to Jethalal's house with a problem, and Tapu gives them a solution. Later, Jethalal asks Tapu about his future plans.

name: Khujli Powder Ka Sach
desc: Inspector Pandey wants to arrest Tapu for throwing itching powder at Bhide. However, Dr Hathi arrives on time and decides to inspect the Holi colours. Will Dr Hathi prove Tapu's innocence?

name: Tension Ke Rang
desc: Gokuldham residents are waiting for Dr Hathi to arrive and treat Bhide. Meanwhile, Inspector Chalu Pandey pays them a surprise visit.

name: Hungame Vaali Holi
desc: Members of the Tapu Sena cover Bhide with Holi colours and drench him with water. Later, Bhide finds out that Tapu mixed itching powder with the colour. What will happen now?

name: Tapu Sena Ke Holi Plans
desc: Tapu Sena tells everyone about their Holi plans. However, Gokuldham residents are worried that something might go wrong as usual. What troubles will be waiting for them?

name: Holika Dahan In Gokuldham
desc: Tapu Sena apologizes to Bhide for pranking him. Meanwhile, preparations for the Holi celebration continue in Gokuldham.

name: Holi Ki Taiyyari
desc: The kids of the colony are excited for Holi and begin their preparations for a memorable celebration. Will everything go according to plan?

name: Jethalal Ka Promise
desc: Jethlalal is stressed about the promise he made to Iyer. Bawri comes to Jethalal's rescue. Will Jethalal keep the promise he made to Iyer?

name: Jethalal Ke Baal Khatre Mein Hai
desc: Jethalal is unable to find the TV anywhere, and he feels hopeless. Meanwhile, Babita and Iyer arrive at Jethalal's shop, hoping to buy the TV from him. What will happen now?

name: Search For The TV
desc: Jethalal throws a tantrum when he finds out that the TV has been sold. How will Jethalal fulfil the promise he made to Babita now?

name: Profit Ka Dukh
desc: Bawri calls Bagha to fix her scooter. Meanwhile, Nattu Kaka is excited as he secured a profitable deal for the TV. What will Jethalal do when he finds out?

name: Jethalal Ki Pratigya
desc: Jethalal vows to shave his head if he is unable to fulfil his promise to Babita. Meanwhile, Bagha and Nattu Kaka find a customer for the TV.

name: Babita Needs Help
desc: Babita wants to gift her cousin a TV which is high in demand. She asks Jethalal for his help in acquiring this TV. Will Jethalal accept her request?

name: Tapu Aur Champaklal Ka Dance
desc: Jethalal tells Baga and Nattu kaka that Tapu is back. Tapu and his friends tell Champaklal they want to dance with him.

name: Bhide Ka Sar Dard
desc: Sonu bursts Bhide's bubble and tells him that Missa is not Tapu's girlfriend. Meanwhile, Tapu celebrates his return by playing cricket with his friends in the society compound.

name: Gada Pariwaar Ki Nayi Bahu
desc: Tapu's college friend comes to Gokuldham to meet him. Jethalal and Bapuji think this girl could be Tapu's future life partner. Will their assumption prove to be correct?

name: Tapu Ka Result
desc: Tapu shows his disappointing exam results to Jethalal. Later, Tapu decides to talk to Jethalal about joining Gada Electronics.
